search.query: `netflow_search_rule_20066` exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" | fillnull value=0 bytes bytes6 | `sampling(bytes)` | `sampling(bytes6)` | eval bytes_calculated=case( "$ipv4_and_or_v6$" == "ipv4" , bytes, "$ipv4_and_or_v6$" == "ipv6" , bytes6, "$ipv4_and_or_v6$" == "both" , (bytes+bytes6) ) | eval gb=bytes_calculated/1024/1024/1024 | lookup `is_local_lookup` asn_lookup asn AS src_asn OUTPUT asname as src_asn_name | lookup `is_local_lookup` asn_lookup asn AS dest_asn OUTPUT asname as dest_asn_name | strcat src_asn ": " src_asn_name src_as_full | strcat dest_asn ": " dest_asn_name dest_as_full | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | chart sum(gb) over $direction$ by exp_ip_name | addtotals fieldname=Total *.*.*.* | sort by -Total | fields - Total | rename $direction$ as "Autonomous System" | head 20

`netflow_search_rule_20066` exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" | fillnull value=0 bytes bytes6 packets packets6 | lookup `is_local_lookup` asn_lookup asn AS src_asn OUTPUT asname as src_asn_name | lookup `is_local_lookup` asn_lookup asn AS dest_asn OUTPUT asname as dest_asn_name | strcat src_asn ": " src_asn_name src_as_full | strcat dest_asn ": " dest_asn_name dest_as_full | `sampling(bytes)` | `sampling(bytes6)` | `sampling(packets)` | `sampling(packets6)` | `sampling(flow_count)` | eval bytes_calculated=case( "$ipv4_and_or_v6$" == "ipv4" , bytes, "$ipv4_and_or_v6$" == "ipv6" , bytes6, "$ipv4_and_or_v6$" == "both" , (bytes+bytes6) ) | eval packets_calculated=case( "$ipv4_and_or_v6$" == "ipv4" , packets, "$ipv4_and_or_v6$" == "ipv6" , packets6, "$ipv4_and_or_v6$" == "both" , (packets+packets6) ) | bin _time $span_token$ | stats sum(bytes_calculated) as sumbytes sum(packets_calculated) as sumpacketsin sum(flow_count) as sumflowcount by nfo_hostname exp_ip $direction$ _time | eval avgbits= sumbytes*8/($span_int$) | stats sum(sumbytes) as TrafficAmount sum(sumpacketsin) as PacketsAmount sum(sumflowcount) as Connections max(avgbits) as MaxTraffic by nfo_hostname exp_ip $direction$ | sort 0 - TrafficAmount | head 100 | eval AverageSpeed=(TrafficAmount)*8/$range$ | eval PacketsSpeed=(PacketsAmount)/$range$ | `default_preparation_for_comma_formatted_table` | table $direction$ nfo_hostname exp_ip_name "Max Mbps" "Average Mbps" "Total Traffic MB" "Average Packets/s" "Total Packets" "Total Connections" | rename nfo_hostname as "NFO" | rename exp_ip_name as "Device" | rename $direction$ as "Autonomous System"

chart.title: Autonomous System: $submitted:Autonomous System$ reported by NFO $NFO$

search.query: `netflow_search_rule_20066` exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" | fillnull value=0 bytes bytes6 | lookup `is_local_lookup` asn_lookup asn AS src_asn OUTPUT asname as src_asn_name | lookup `is_local_lookup` asn_lookup asn AS dest_asn OUTPUT asname as dest_asn_name | strcat src_asn ": " src_asn_name src_as_full | strcat dest_asn ": " dest_asn_name dest_as_full | search $direction$="$Autonomous System$" | `sampling(bytes)` | `sampling(bytes6)` | eval bytes_calculated=case( "$ipv4_and_or_v6$" == "ipv4" , bytes, "$ipv4_and_or_v6$" == "ipv6" , bytes6, "$ipv4_and_or_v6$" == "both" , (bytes+bytes6) ) | eval gb=bytes_calculated/1024/1024/1024 | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | timechart sum(gb) by exp_ip_name

`netflow_search_rule_20066` exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" | fillnull value=0 bytes bytes6 packets packets6 | lookup `is_local_lookup` asn_lookup asn AS src_asn OUTPUT asname as src_asn_name | lookup `is_local_lookup` asn_lookup asn AS dest_asn OUTPUT asname as dest_asn_name | strcat src_asn ": " src_asn_name src_as_full | strcat dest_asn ": " dest_asn_name dest_as_full | search $direction$="$Autonomous System$" | `sampling(bytes)` | `sampling(bytes6)` | `sampling(packets)` | `sampling(packets6)` | `sampling(flow_count)` | eval bytes_calculated=case( "$ipv4_and_or_v6$" == "ipv4" , bytes, "$ipv4_and_or_v6$" == "ipv6" , bytes6, "$ipv4_and_or_v6$" == "both" , (bytes+bytes6) ) | eval packets_calculated=case( "$ipv4_and_or_v6$" == "ipv4" , packets, "$ipv4_and_or_v6$" == "ipv6" , packets6, "$ipv4_and_or_v6$" == "both" , (packets+packets6) ) | bin _time $span_token$ | stats sum(bytes_calculated) as sumbytes sum(packets_calculated) as sumpacketsin sum(flow_count) as sumflowcount by exp_ip $direction$ _time | eval avgbits= sumbytes*8/($span_int$) | stats sum(sumbytes) as TrafficAmount sum(sumpacketsin) as PacketsAmount sum(sumflowcount) as Connections max(avgbits) as MaxTraffic by exp_ip $direction$ | sort 0 - TrafficAmount | head 100 | eval AverageSpeed=(TrafficAmount)*8/$range$ | eval PacketsSpeed=(PacketsAmount)/$range$ | `default_preparation_for_comma_formatted_table` | table $direction$ exp_ip_name "Max Mbps" "Average Mbps" "Total Traffic MB" "Average Packets/s" "Total Packets" "Total Connections" | rename exp_ip_name as "Device" | rename $direction$ as "Autonomous System"

html.p: You see this message because there is no data for the selected Time Range or the App Setup is not completed.

This dashboard is populated by NetFlow Optimizer (NFO) Logic Module “10066: Autonomous Systems Monitor” (syslogs with nfc_id=20066). This Module reports traffic by all Autonomous Systems (AS). This information is provided per NetFlow exporter. This Module is packaged in NFO “Network Traffic and Devices Monitor” Module Set.
Please either change the Time Range or make sure that this NFO Logic Module is enabled. See NSO Configuration for more details.
